title: ImplementAndGateInput
description: Workflow input for implement-and-gate. The brief is EMBEDDED verbatim (an object conforming to brief.schema.json) — never referenced by id, and never $ref'd (schemas are self-contained on every harness).

brief.description: A Brief conforming to brief.schema.json, embedded verbatim.

isolation.description: Isolated-workspace mode. Shared-checkout runs are not a legal value, on purpose.

node.description: Optional node affinity; when set, workspace-bound steps pin to it.

fix_cap.description: Max gate-red → implementer-resume rounds before surfacing to the operator with the full gate record.

id.description: fmt / clippy / test / ... — stable within the run.

command.description: The exact command whose OWN exit status judges the gate. Full-workspace scope is doctrine (rigid step 5); the schema cannot check that, review of this input can.

gates.description: The gate battery, ordered. Language-specific sets are a parameter here, not a fork of the workflow.

implementer_model.description: The frontier escape hatch for hard briefs: overrides the implementer profile's model at harness invocation (invocation-level model override outranks the profile — verified Norn layering; same mechanism on claude-runner). The workflow REJECTS any override that makes the implementer's model equal a review lens's model — the review-independence rule survives the hatch.
